title: GridStatus ERCOT Estimated Coincident Peak Load (Simple)
description:
This dataset contains key data series related to coincident peak intervals in ERCOT as well as an estimated coincident peak load value, all in real-time. There are four fifteen-minute coincident peak intervals each year, one in each of the summer months. The estimated value in this dataset utilizes operational load and real-time storage operations in ERCOT. 

The dataseries comprising this dataset are real-time operational data and should not be used in place of settlement data. 

This view only uses the [ERCOT System-Level Load and ESR Charging](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/ercot_system_load_charging_4_seconds) dataset and thus only has data beginning June 1, 2025. For a more detailed ERCOT coincident peak view with data going back further in time, see [ERCOT Estimated Coincident Peak Load](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/ercot_estimated_coincident_peak_load).
